---
on:
  schedule: daily
permissions:
      contents: read
engine: copilot
network: defaults
---

# daily-report

Run daily at 9 AM and create an issue with a summary of repository activity from past 24 hours. Include commits, pull requests, issues, and CI/CD failures.
